GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "Model Georgia Fowler shares her favourite pieces for a new season wardrobe refresh", "Fowler selects her top five resort picks from David Jones and explains how best to wear them.", "David Jones's first-ever virtual runway show, in celebration of Vogue American Express Fashion's Night In, lit up screens last week. Set against the stunning backdrop of the famed Seidler House, an architectural marvel in the picturesque Southern Highlands, the catwalk was also surrounded by iconic Australian landscape – the perfect inspiration for a new season of style. This truly unique fashion experience, which featured stellar Australian models like Akiima and Cameron Stephens, clad in a roll call of David Jones's exclusive local and international designers like Aje, St Agni, Bondi Born, Maticevski, Isabel Marant and Balenciaga, left a lasting impression. Also among the models on the catwalk for David Jones was New Zealand-born, Victoria's Secret beauty Georgia Fowler, who found plenty of new season favourites to love. Vogue asked her to pick her must-haves from the show. "For summer months, I love to incorporate effortless pieces in sandy tones, with stand-out accessories that really complement a tan. It's important to me to buy items that stand the test of time and I am able dress up or down, and mix and match with old and new," she said. Georgia has a soft spot for the Bec + Bridge Farrah swimsuit that she wore during the runway show. The Australian design duo's spin on a sexy one-piece is perfect for strutting poolside, and is just as chic with a breezy cover-up thrown over. Her next pick from the resort collections is Aje's gathered bib top, as worn in the show by breakout beauty, Cameron Stephens. The flattering fit and on-trend rust shade make it as pretty worn as a two-piece with the matching skirt or dressed down with a pair of blue jeans. For a more relaxed take on resort chic, Fowler loves the utilitarian feel of Isabel Marant Etoile's beige shorts. Team them with a tucked-in shirt and statement sandals, or go low-fi with a crisp, white Bassike tee. Also on Fowler's new season shopping list is the perfect jean by Danish purveyors of cool, Ganni. In a vintage-inspired cut and washed-out black colour, they're go-anywhere kind of jeans that only get better with age. Georgia's favourite accessory should also go straight to your own resort wardrobe wish list: Aje's chunky gold choker, which adds the right amount of new season edge to any outfit. Use it to give oomph to a pretty springtime dress or to add a touch of bling to sleek tailoring. Shop Georgia's top picks and the best in Resort fashion at davidjones.com"
